steps.title: Contrast the two styles
steps.content: Moreau's realist painting emphasizes accuracy and ordinary working people. Veyre's romantic paintings instead idealize subjects with staged settings and smooth, unblemished skin. The blank should show that realism moved away from those romantic conventions.

steps.title: Pick the opposition verb
steps.content: Choice B would mean realism built on romantic conventions. Choice C would mean realism copied them. Choice D would mean realism perfectly represented romantic conventions. Those choices contradict the contrast. The needed verb means refused or turned away from. The answer is A.
